=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:15-6:25) TS377067: This Effect code uses `Date.now()`, time access in Effect code is represented through `Clock` from Effect. effect(globalDateInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalDateInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalDateInEffect for entire file"
